/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/threshold_test.dir/src/threshold_types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/threshold_test.dir/src/db_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/threshold_test.dir/src/meal_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/threshold_test.dir/src/food_data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/threshold_test.dir/src/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/threshold_test.dir/test/main_test.cpp.o -o threshold_test  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so -lpthread
